lines.text: 松影斑驳的山道旁，木桑道人背着棋盘，笑意满面。
lines.textEn: Along the dappled pine path, Taoist Musang carries a Go board with a warm smile.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 小友，棋盘随身，世上便不怕无弈友。
lines.textEn: Young friend, with a Go board at hand, one never fears the lack of opponents.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 道长好兴致。听说你有一盘名局？
lines.textEn: Master, you seem in fine spirits. I heard you have a famed game?

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 人称“千变万劫”。棋势如江海，牵一子动全局。
lines.textEn: They call it “Infinite Variations.” A board flows like rivers and seas—move one stone, and the whole game shifts.

lines.text: 他一面布子，一面说起山中清修与棋道相通之理。
lines.textEn: As he lays stones, he speaks of how mountain cultivation mirrors the Way of Go.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 武学讲究气脉，棋局讲究气口。都要看远、算深。
lines.textEn: Martial arts focus on meridians; Go focuses on liberties. Both require long sight and deep calculation.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 若是心乱，棋也乱。
lines.textEn: If the mind is in chaos, the board follows.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 说得好。棋有生死，亦有取舍。
lines.textEn: Well said. Go has life and death, and the art of letting go.

lines.text: 他忽然把一颗黑子按在险处，像是试探命运。
lines.textEn: He presses a black stone into a perilous spot, as if testing fate.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 老道不久要远行，此局便当一卦。
lines.textEn: I must soon travel far. Let this game be a divination.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 远行之事，可愿详说？
lines.textEn: Would you share more about this journey?

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 为一件师门遗物。先机一失，便再难追。
lines.textEn: For a relic of my lineage. Lose the first move, and it is hard to recover.

lines.text: 烛影摇曳，他的脸在光影中忽明忽暗。
lines.textEn: Candlelight flickers, his face shifting between light and shadow.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 这片黑子，就像我此行，步步凶险。
lines.textEn: This black group is like my journey—danger at every step.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 可否先稳住一隅，再图他处？
lines.textEn: Could you secure a corner first, then seek elsewhere?

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 嗯……退一步，未必是退。
lines.textEn: Hmm… one step back is not always retreat.

lines.text: 你转身在远角落子，腾出眼位。
lines.textEn: You turn and play in a far corner, creating an eye.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 妙着！此局可活。
lines.textEn: A brilliant move! This game can live.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 胜负之外，只求心安。
lines.textEn: Beyond winning or losing, I seek only peace of mind.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 老道自吹也好，今日却是真的开心。
lines.textEn: Call it boastful if you like, but today I am truly happy.

lines.text: 他把棋子收好，神色轻快了许多。
lines.textEn: He gathers the stones, his expression much lighter.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 这份棋谱赠你，记下今日心境。
lines.textEn: This Go record is for you—keep today’s mood in your heart.

choices.text: 收下棋道手札与山行护符
choices.textEn: Take the Go notes and talisman

items.name: 棋道手札
items.description: 记录木桑道人心得，携带可提升内力上限。
items.descriptionEn: Notes of Taoist Musang; carrying increases max qi.

items.name: 山行护符
items.description: 山中求安的护身符，携带可提升体力上限。
items.descriptionEn: A talisman for mountain travel; carrying increases max stamina.

choices.textEn: Take pine tea and the Go set

items.name: 松针清茶
items.description: 山中清茶，携带可提升少量内力上限。
items.descriptionEn: A mountain tea; carrying slightly increases max qi.

lines.text: 万劫谷石屋内，石屑纷飞，一张十九道棋盘在青石上刻成。青石表面寒气逼人，石粉如雾缓缓落下，落在棋盘线条间，像给这局添了一层薄霜。两人的气息在狭小石室里回荡，连空气都像被刀削过。
lines.textEn: Inside the stone house of Wanjie Valley, a 19-line board is carved into blue rock as stone chips fly. The stone is cold to the touch, and the powder falls like mist into the lines, as if laying a thin frost over the game. Their breathing echoes in the narrow chamber, the air itself feeling honed.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 段施主，棋局定胜负，可敢一局？今日之争，不求刀兵，只求一局定局。老僧愿以棋见心，胜负由棋面作证。
lines.textEn: Benefactor Duan, shall we let the board decide victory? Today’s struggle needs no blades—only a game to decide. I would rather see the heart through Go, with the board as witness.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 金刚指力，好功夫！你刻线如刻骨，倒是配这石盘。只是棋盘虽硬，胜负更硬。
lines.textEn: Diamond Finger power—fine skill! Your lines cut like bone, fitting for this stone board. Yet though the board is hard, victory and defeat are harder still.

lines.text: 铁杖与木槌在石上留下深痕，黑白势子落定。每一道刻痕都直如尺规，双方都在比拼劲力与心定，谁也不愿先露一丝不整。棋盘既成，屋内静得只剩呼吸。
lines.textEn: Iron staff and wooden mallet leave deep marks as black and white positions are set. Each groove is straight as a ruler, a contest of power and composure—neither willing to show the slightest unevenness. With the board complete, only breathing remains.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 施主功力深厚，老僧不敢逞强，还望让上几子。让子非求便宜，是给彼此一条退路。若你愿让，老僧也敢竭尽所学。
lines.textEn: Your power runs deep; I dare not boast—allow me a few handicap stones. This is not greed, but a courtesy that leaves both a path. If you concede, I will still give all I know.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 棋上要分胜负，便当平下。让子得胜，胜也无味；让子得败，败更难言。
lines.textEn: If we seek a true result, we play even. Win with a handicap and the victory tastes thin; lose with one and the defeat is harder to bear.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 四子如何？三子也可。老僧棋力不济，若全凭侥幸，怕误了大局。让得一分，才有余地谈大事。
lines.textEn: Four stones? Three will do. My Go is modest; if I rely on luck alone, I fear I will ruin a greater matter. Grant a little and we can still speak of the larger stakes.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 既自认不及，何必再局？最多让一先。除此之外，再无可谈。
lines.textEn: If you admit inferiority, why play? At most, take the first move. Beyond that, there is nothing to discuss.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 哈哈，原来施主棋力也不过如此，不妨我让你三子。看你有无把握，敢不敢接这份让？
lines.textEn: Ha! So your Go is only so-so. Then I will give you three stones. Do you have the courage to accept what I offer?

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 不必相让，分先对弈。先后之争，用手段定，不用口舌。
lines.textEn: No need for concessions. Let us play for first move. The order will be decided by skill, not words.

lines.text: 黄眉僧心下愈发忌惮，暗知此人不骄不躁，难以激怒。对方面无波澜，像一口深井，任你掷石，也看不见底。老僧的笑意里，隐隐多了几分凝重。
lines.textEn: Huangmei grows wary; he senses this man is calm and hard to provoke. The other’s face is a deep well—no matter what you throw in, you cannot see the bottom. Beneath the monk’s smile, a hint of gravity gathers.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 先后之争，便赌一线气运。若先手在我，老僧便可自保；若先手在你，老僧也认这份天意。
lines.textEn: For the first move, let us wager a thread of fate. If the initiative is mine, I can protect myself; if it is yours, I will accept that destiny.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 你想争先手，便使出你的本事。靠赌得来的先手，不算先手。
lines.textEn: If you want the first move, show your skill. Initiative won by wagering is no true initiative.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 先手关乎生死，施主可敢一赌？这不是赌命，是赌心——心若定，手便定。
lines.textEn: The first move decides life or death. Do you dare? This is not a wager of life, but of heart—if the heart is steady, the hand is steady.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 赌什么？说清楚。
lines.textEn: What is the wager? Speak plainly.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 猜我年过七十时，足趾是奇是偶。猜得中，你先；猜不中，我先。
lines.textEn: Guess: when I am over seventy, will my toes be odd or even? Guess right and you play first; guess wrong and I do.

lines.text: 段延庆暗自思量，仍答“偶”。他的眼却不看对方，只盯着棋盘的空点，像在衡量一条不露形的路。
lines.textEn: Duan Yanqing thinks and answers, “Even.” Yet he does not look at the monk, only at empty points on the board, as if measuring a path without form.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 偶数。说罢便下，不必拖。
lines.textEn: Even. Speak no more—let us play.

lines.text: 黄眉僧笑而不语，除靴验足，竟两足完好无缺。那一瞬间，你几乎以为此赌就此落定。石室里只听见衣袍摩挲的轻响。
lines.textEn: Huangmei smiles silently, removes his shoes—both feet are intact. For a heartbeat, you think the wager is settled. Only the soft rustle of robes fills the stone room.

lines.text: 他忽提小铁槌，断下一趾，血珠溅在石面。血滴滚入棋线，像一枚枚黑子坠下，寒意直透人背。
lines.textEn: He lifts a small iron hammer and severs a toe, blood splashing on stone. The drops roll into the lines like black stones falling, a chill running down spines.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 今我六十九，待七十，足趾成奇。先手归我，老僧不敢轻慢半分。
lines.textEn: I am sixty-nine. When I reach seventy, the count will be odd. The first move is mine, and I will not treat it lightly.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 好。先手归你。赢与不赢，终归棋盘定。
lines.textEn: Fine. The first move is yours. Win or lose will be decided on the board.

lines.text: 先手既定，局势更添肃杀。空气像被系紧的弓弦，稍一触碰便要震响。你能听见众人吞咽的声音。
lines.textEn: With first move decided, the air grows even more tense—like a bowstring drawn tight, ready to snap. You can hear people swallowing.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 今日一子之先，关乎万民命数。老僧不求虚名，只求一局能换来太平。
lines.textEn: A single move today may decide countless lives. I seek no empty fame—only a game that buys peace.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 命数？我只信胜负。胜者为理，败者无言。
lines.textEn: Fate? I only believe in victory. The winner holds the reason; the loser has none.

lines.text: 棋势如剑，针锋相对。第一手落下，像在石面刻出一道裂痕，连风也一滞。你知道，这盘棋不会轻易收手。
lines.textEn: The board sharpens like a sword—edge to edge. The first move lands like a crack in stone, even the wind pausing. You know this game will not end easily.

lines.text: 棋局中盘，黑子突变，白势摇摇欲坠。黑方像猛兽突然折返，白棋阵地被撕开一道口子，寒意从那口子里钻出。石室深处的火光摇晃，你甚至能听见棋盘木槌的轻颤。
lines.textEn: Midgame shifts: black transforms, white’s position trembles. Black turns like a beast and tears a gap; a chill slips through. The firelight in the stone chamber wavers, and you can almost hear the board’s mallet tremble.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: （低声）这一手若不变，怕要失先。若再守，便是被牵着走。若能破口而出，也许尚有回旋。
lines.textEn: (low) If this isn’t changed, we may lose the initiative. To keep defending is to be led by the nose. If we break out here, there may still be room to turn.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 施主既有见，老僧愿从。愿从不是盲从，是愿将此局与施主共担。
lines.textEn: If you see a way, I will follow. This is not blind obedience, but a willingness to share the burden of the game.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 旁观不语才像君子，多管闲事才是真胆。你既插手，便要为此负担。
lines.textEn: A gentleman watches in silence; meddling is the true boldness. If you intervene, you must bear the weight of it.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: 你困我在此，我又怎能沉默？若看着别人陷于绝地而不语，那才是懦弱。
lines.textEn: You trapped me here—how could I stay silent? To watch another fall into a dead end and say nothing—that would be cowardice.

lines.text: 破嗔在背上写下七手，白子一度转危为安。那七手像水流般顺势而出，白棋的气口短暂复苏。众人屏息，黄眉僧的眉目也稍稍舒展。
lines.textEn: He writes seven moves on his back; white briefly turns danger into safety. Those seven moves flow like water, restoring the white liberties for a moment. Everyone holds their breath; even Huangmei’s brow relaxes slightly.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 棋在心中，气在指上。心稳一分，指便稳一分；气不断，势便不断。
lines.textEn: The board is in the heart; the power is at the fingertips. Steady the heart and the fingers steadies; keep the breath and the momentum endures.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 好招。可惜，你终要露出破绽。胜负不是一手定，而是你终会疲惫。
lines.textEn: A fine move. Pity—you will still reveal a flaw. Victory is not decided by one move, but by the moment you tire.

lines.text: 黑子忽然弃势夺要，白棋一时难解。那一弃像削去自己一块皮，却换来对方心口的一刀。局势陡然翻涌，白棋的眼位被逼得越来越窄。
lines.textEn: Black suddenly yields influence to seize the key point; white struggles to respond. The sacrifice is like peeling off one’s own skin to cut the opponent’s heart. The position surges, and white’s eyes are pressed ever tighter.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: 若换此手，可借劫转势。劫如风，若能借风，或可再活。
lines.textEn: If we change to this move, a ko can turn the tide. A ko is like the wind; if we can ride it, we may live again.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 老僧再赌一线。若此处再失，便以此命偿棋。
lines.textEn: Then I wager another thread. If this fails, I will pay for the game with my life.

lines.text: 铁杖失势，一子成了败笔，段延庆怒碎棋盘。石屑再次飞起，棋子滚落一地，黑白分不清。那一瞬你看见胜负之外的狂怒与空虚。
lines.textEn: The iron staff loses shape; one move becomes the blunder. Duan Yanqing smashes the board in rage, stone chips flying, stones scattering, black and white indistinguishable. In that moment you see fury and emptiness beyond victory and defeat.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 此局不算完，天机终会翻转。棋盘碎了，命数未碎。
lines.textEn: This game is not over. Heaven will yet turn. The board is broken, but destiny is not.

items.name: 禅定香囊
items.description: 佛门静心之物，小幅提升内力恢复。
items.descriptionEn: A calming Buddhist sachet; slightly boosts inner power regen.

items.name: 铁杖印记
items.description: 暗示段延庆记下你的援手，战斗银两奖励略增。
items.descriptionEn: A mark of favor; battle silver rewards slightly increase.

lines.text: 后院，一面墙竟刻成棋盘，棋子嵌入石道。
lines.textEn: In the back courtyard, a wall is carved into a Go board, stones embedded in stone grooves.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 此局不用手落子，用腕与劲。
lines.textEn: In this game, you place stones not with your hand but with wrist and force.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 把棋子当暗器？
lines.textEn: You use stones as hidden weapons?

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 棋为器，心为势。若势先到，子自会中。
lines.textEn: The stone is a tool; the mind is the momentum. If the momentum arrives first, the stone will land true.

lines.text: 黑子飞出，嵌入棋道，劲风卷起尘屑。
lines.textEn: A black stone flies, embedding into the groove as a gust whips dust.

lines.speaker: 庄客
lines.text: 好准的手劲！
lines.textEn: What precise force!

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 准不准，要看对手如何守。
lines.textEn: Precision depends on how the opponent defends.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 棋局若失先机，如何补救？
lines.textEn: If you lose the initiative, how do you recover?

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 破阵不靠守，靠变。
lines.textEn: Breaking a formation is not defense—it is change.

lines.text: 白子一投，略偏半寸，局势忽然倒转。
lines.textEn: A white stone is thrown half an inch off, and the position suddenly flips.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 你看，棋子偏了，便是破绽。
lines.textEn: See? A stone that drifts is a flaw.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 所以要稳住心手。
lines.textEn: So the mind and hand must be steady.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 也要敢于乱。乱中求胜，才是暗器之道。
lines.textEn: You must also dare to be chaotic. Winning amid disorder is the way of hidden weapons.

lines.text: 他示范将一颗黑子打歪，落在意想不到的点位。
lines.textEn: He demonstrates by skewing a black stone to land on an unexpected point.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 此招名为棋子暗器，扰乱对手心神。
lines.textEn: This technique is called Stone-as-Weapon, unsettling the opponent’s mind.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 乱中不失其道，才是真本事。
lines.textEn: To keep your way within chaos—that is real skill.

lines.text: 他收手一笑，将一小袋石子递到你手里。
lines.textEn: He smiles and hands you a small pouch of stones.

items.name: 定手石
items.description: 练习手腕稳定的石子，提升暗器命中率，可将棋子暗器技能提升一个等级。
items.descriptionEn: A stone for steadying the wrist; improves accuracy and raises the Stone-as-Weapon skill by one level.

items.name: 散势袋
items.description: 乱局之物，使用后减少一次技能冷却。
items.descriptionEn: A tool for chaotic play; reduces one skill cooldown.

lines.text: 昆仑空地上风沙扑面，何足道缓步走到古松前，剑尖抵地，一划一划地划了起来。剑势不疾不徐，横着十九招，转向纵划又一十九招，纵横线条平直如尺，尘土被剑气拂起又沉落。郭襄默数剑招，越看越疑，直到看见那纵横十九道都成了棋盘，才忽然明白。
lines.textEn: On the Kunlun sands, He Zudao walks to an open patch before an old pine. With his sword tip on the ground, he draws line after line—nineteen across, then nineteen down—each stroke straight as a ruler. Dust rises and settles with the sword’s breath. Guo Xiang counts the moves in silence, puzzled until she realizes the lines form a Go board.

lines.speaker: 郭襄
lines.text: 世间怎会有如此奇怪的剑法？难道以剑尖在地下乱划，便能克敌制胜？此人之怪，真是难以测度。
lines.textEn: How can there be such a strange sword art? Can one really defeat enemies by scratching the ground with a sword tip? This man’s oddity is truly hard to fathom.

lines.text: 他在四角布势，圆圈是白子，交叉是黑子，剑尖点点，像落子落在心头。走到第十九着，他以剑拄地，低头沉思，像在权衡弃子取势还是力争边角。
lines.textEn: He lays out the four corners—circles for white, crosses for black—each touch of the sword tip like a stone placed upon the heart. At the nineteenth move he props the sword against the ground and lowers his head, weighing whether to sacrifice for influence or cling to the corners.

lines.speaker: 郭襄
lines.text: 此人和我一般寂寞，空山抚琴，以雀鸟为知音；下棋又没对手，只得自己跟自己下。
lines.textEn: This man is as lonely as I am—playing music in empty mountains with birds as his only audience; with no opponent for Go, he must play against himself.

lines.text: 白子不肯罢休，与黑子在左上角展开剧斗，妙着纷纭，自北而南，渐渐争到中腹。郭襄看得出神，忍不住走近几步，目光在棋盘上来回游走。
lines.textEn: White refuses to yield and clashes with black in the upper-left; brilliant moves bloom, pushing from north to south until the fight reaches the center. Guo Xiang watches, entranced, and steps closer, her gaze tracing the board.

lines.text: 到了第九十三着，白势遇连环劫，岌岌可危，却仍勉力支撑。棋局既深，忽见一线空阔，西边仍留一大片空地。郭襄望着局势，心中一动。
lines.textEn: At the ninety-third move, white meets a chain of kos and teeters on the edge, yet struggles on. In the depth of the position, a broad emptiness remains to the west. Guo Xiang’s heart stirs as she watches.

lines.speaker: 郭襄
lines.text: 常言道：“当局者迷，旁观者清。”
lines.textEn: As the saying goes: “Those in the game are confused; those outside see clearly.”

lines.speaker: 郭襄
lines.text: 何不径弃中原，反取西域？
lines.textEn: Why not abandon the central plains and take the western regions instead?

lines.text: 他闻言一凛，见西边仍空，若乘打劫之势连下两子，占据要津，即使弃了中腹，仍可争得不胜不败。念头既定，他仰天长笑，剑尖连点两处，局面随之顿转。
lines.textEn: He startles at the words and sees the west still open. If he rides the ko to play two stones and seize the key points, he can abandon the center and still salvage a draw. With the thought decided, he laughs skyward and taps two points in a row, the balance turning at once.

lines.speaker: 何足道
lines.text: 好，好！
lines.textEn: Good, good!

lines.text: 笑声在山谷回荡，风沙也像被他的笑意拂开。棋局虽是消闲，却在此刻像一场生死相搏，扣人心弦。
lines.textEn: His laughter echoes through the valley, the wind and sand seeming to part with it. Though Go is a pastime, in this moment it feels like a life-and-death duel, gripping the heart.

items.name: 清弦谱
items.description: 琴谱一页，提升内力恢复效率。
items.descriptionEn: A page of music that boosts inner power recovery.

items.name: 决断符
items.description: 提升一次技能使用上限提示。

lines.text: 梅庄密室里，古谱摊开。黑白子名中自带黑白，对围棋的痴迷不言而喻。向问天投其所好，引他入局，《呕血谱》的传说也被搬上桌面——昔日国手刘仲甫据说在此谱中惨败，呕血数升。二人走到六十余手便停住，黑白子更是念念不忘。
lines.textEn: In Meizhuang’s secret room, the ancient manual lies open. Hei Baizi’s very name speaks of black and white, and his love of Go is plain. Xiang Wentian plays to that obsession, laying out the tale of the Vomiting Blood Manual. They reach the sixties in moves and pause, leaving Hei Baizi restless.

lines.text: 向问天走到石几前，在棋盘“平、上、去、入”四角摆了势子，又在“平部”六三路放白子、九三路放黑子，六五路放白子、九五路放黑子，置子渐慢。黑白缠斗极烈，中间无一子余裕，黑白子额上汗水涔涔而下。
lines.textEn: Xiang Wentian lays out the opening at the four corners—ping, shang, qu, ru—then places stones at 6-3, 9-3, 6-5, 9-5, the pace slowing. The fight is fierce with no spare moves, and sweat beads on Hei Baizi’s brow.

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 下一步怎样？
lines.textEn: What about the next move?

lines.speaker: 向问天
lines.text: 这是关键所在，以二庄主高见，该当如何？
lines.textEn: This is the critical point. What does the Second Master think?

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 这一子吗？断又不妥，连也不对，冲是冲不出，做活却又活不成。这……这……这……
lines.textEn: This move? Cutting is wrong, connecting is wrong, pushing won’t break out, and even trying to live fails. This… this… this…

lines.text: 他手中拈着一枚白子，在石几上轻轻敲击，直过了一顿饭时分，这一子始终无法放入棋局。
lines.textEn: He holds a white stone and taps it softly on the stone table. A whole meal’s time passes, and the stone still cannot be placed.

lines.speaker: 丹青生
lines.text: 童老兄，这是《呕血谱》，难道你真要我二哥想得呕血不成？下一步怎么下，爽爽快快说出来吧。
lines.textEn: Brother Tong, this is the Vomiting Blood Manual—are you really going to make my second brother think until he coughs blood? Say the next move, quick and clear.

lines.speaker: 向问天
lines.text: 好！这第六十七子，下在这里。
lines.textEn: Good! The sixty-seventh stone goes here.

lines.text: 他说罢落子，于是在“上部”七四路下了一子，局面顿时见了生机。黑白子一震，重重一拍大腿。
lines.textEn: With that, he places a stone at the 7-4 point in the upper side, and the position suddenly shows life. Hei Baizi jolts and slaps his thigh.

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 好，这一子下在此处，确是妙着。
lines.textEn: Good—placing the stone here is indeed a brilliant move.

lines.text: 他将古谱拓印递给你，墨迹未干，余势犹在。
lines.textEn: He hands you a rubbing of the manual, the ink still fresh and the momentum lingering.

items.name: 呕血谱拓本
items.description: 一份棋谱拓印，可用于研究任务。
items.descriptionEn: A rubbing of the manual, useful for research quests.

items.name: 静心墨石
items.description: 能让思路更清晰的小道具。
items.descriptionEn: A small tool that clears the mind.

lines.text: 擂鼓山石台前，珍珑棋局布成，黑白势子纠缠成网。棋盘雕在青石上，晶莹的黑白子密布如星，段誉沉吟良久，连下十余路，终觉难以再深一步。
lines.textEn: Before the stone platform of Leigu Mountain, the Zhenlong Puzzle is set—black and white tangled like a net. The board is carved into blue rock, stones shining like stars. Duan Yu plays more than ten moves and still cannot see deeper.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: 老先生所摆的珍珑深奥巧妙之极，晚生破解不来。
lines.textEn: The Zhenlong puzzle you set is profoundly subtle; I cannot solve it.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 公子棋思精密，这十几路棋已臻极高的境界，只是未能再想深一步，可惜，可惜。唉，可惜，可惜！
lines.textEn: Young master, your thinking is meticulous and these dozen moves reach a very high realm, yet you could not think one step deeper—what a pity, what a pity.

lines.text: 段誉将所下的白子捡回木盒，棋盘上仍留着原来的阵势，四下无声。
lines.textEn: Duan Yu collects his white stones into the box, leaving the original formation on the board. Silence settles over the crowd.

lines.text: 范百龄凝神细算，劫中有劫，反复推演，忽觉头晕脑胀，喉头一甜，鲜血几欲喷出。棋局之险，逼得他气血翻涌。
lines.textEn: Fan Bailing calculates intently; ko within ko, counterattack within counterattack. He grows dizzy, sweetness rising in his throat as blood threatens to spill. The puzzle’s peril churns his qi and blood.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 这局棋原是极难，你天资有限，虽然棋力不弱，却也多半解不开，何况又有丁春秋这恶贼在旁施展邪术，迷人心魄，实在大是凶险，你到底要想下去呢，还是不想了？
lines.textEn: This puzzle is extremely hard. Your talent is limited; though your skill is not weak, you likely cannot solve it. And with Ding Chunqiu applying evil arts nearby, it is perilous—will you continue or not?

lines.speaker: 范百龄
lines.text: 生死有命，弟……我……我……决意尽心尽力。
lines.textEn: Life and death are fated. I… I… I am resolved to do my utmost.

lines.text: 他点头再算，身子摇摇晃晃，又喷了一大口鲜血。
lines.textEn: He nods and calculates again, his body swaying before he spits another great mouthful of blood.

lines.text: 慕容复凝神入局，自信已想出解法，鸠摩智却在关键处一着搅乱，全盘计谋尽数落空。局面翻转，他脸色渐白，眼神开始涣散。
lines.textEn: Murong Fu enters the puzzle, confident in his solution, only for Jiumozhi to disrupt it with a key move that shatters his plan. The position turns, his face paling and his gaze drifting.

lines.speaker: 鸠摩智
lines.text: 慕容公子，你武功虽强，这弈道只怕也是平常。
lines.textEn: Young Master Murong, your martial arts are strong, but your Go seems ordinary.

lines.speaker: 慕容复
lines.text: 未必便输于你。
lines.textEn: Not necessarily inferior to you.

lines.speaker: 鸠摩智
lines.text: 慕容公子，你连我在边角上的纠缠也摆脱不了，还想逐鹿中原么？
lines.textEn: Young Master Murong, you cannot even shake my corner entanglement—how will you contend for the Central Plains?

lines.speaker: 慕容复
lines.text: 我慕容氏天命已尽，一切枉费心机。我一生尽心竭力，终究化作一场春梦！时也命也，夫复何言？
lines.textEn: The destiny of House Murong is exhausted; all schemes are vain. I have spent my life striving, only to wake from a spring dream. Fate and time—what more is there to say?

lines.text: 鸠摩智立在局旁，神情从容，仿佛只是来观一场戏。他的语气既清冷又自负，旁人听来如风掠过。
lines.textEn: Jiumozhi stands by the board, composed as if watching a play. His tone is cool and proud, like a wind passing through.

lines.speaker: 鸠摩智
lines.text: 小僧途中得见聪辩先生棋会邀帖，不自量力，前来会见天下高人。
lines.textEn: On the road I saw the chess gathering invitation and, overestimating myself, came to meet the greats of the world.

lines.speaker: 鸠摩智
lines.text: 这个棋局，原本世人无人能解，乃是用来作弄人的。小僧有自知之明，不想多耗心血于无益之事。
lines.textEn: This puzzle is one no one can solve; it was made to toy with people. I know my limits and will not waste effort on a fruitless task.

lines.text: 段延庆凝神落子，二十余手后日已偏西。棋路起初端正，后来渐入旁门，越走越偏，眉间阴影愈深。
lines.textEn: Duan Yanqing concentrates on his stones; after twenty moves the sun tilts west. His path starts straight, then slides into side roads, drifting farther as a shadow gathers between his brows.

lines.speaker: 玄难
lines.text: 段施主，你起初十着走的是正着，第十一着起，走入了旁门，越走越偏，再也难以挽救了。
lines.textEn: Benefactor Duan, your first ten moves were correct; from the eleventh you strayed into a side path, drifting farther and becoming beyond rescue.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 你少林派是名门正宗，依你正道，却又如何解法？
lines.textEn: Your Shaolin is orthodox—how would your righteous path solve this?

lines.speaker: 玄难
lines.text: 这棋局似正非正，似邪非邪，用正道是解不开的，但若纯走偏锋，却也不行！
lines.textEn: This puzzle is neither wholly right nor wrong; it cannot be solved by the orthodox path, yet a purely crooked path also fails.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 前无去路，后有追兵，正也不是，邪也不是，那可难也！
lines.textEn: No road ahead, enemies behind—neither right nor wrong works. How can this not be hard?

lines.speaker: 丁春秋
lines.text: 是啊！一个人由正入邪易，改邪归正难，你这一生啊，注定是毁了，毁了，毁了！唉，可惜，一失足成千古恨，再想回首，那也是不能了！
lines.textEn: Yes! It is easy to turn from right to wrong, hard to return. Your life is doomed—doomed, doomed! Alas, one misstep becomes eternal regret; there is no turning back.

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 这一着只怕不行！
lines.textEn: I fear this move will not work!

lines.text: 他自觉棋艺低劣，却为救人心急，忽道要入局捣乱，取过一枚白子，闭目随手放下。
lines.textEn: Knowing his Go is poor, he speaks in haste to save someone and steps in, taking a white stone and placing it blindly.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 胡闹，胡闹，你自填一气，自己杀死一块白棋，哪有这等下棋的法子？
lines.textEn: Nonsense, nonsense! You have filled your own liberty and killed your own white group—what kind of Go is that?

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 小僧棋艺低劣，胡乱下子，志在救人。这盘棋小僧是不会下的，请老前辈原谅。
lines.textEn: My Go is poor; I played blindly to save someone. I cannot play this game—please forgive me, elder.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 小师父，你杀了自己一块棋子，黑棋再逼紧一步，你如何应法？
lines.textEn: Little master, you killed your own group; if black presses further, how will you respond?

lines.text: 他惶然无措之际，耳畔忽有细声指点方位。
lines.textEn: As he stands helpless, a soft voice guides him.

lines.speaker: 神秘声音
lines.text: 去位、平位、上位皆可破势，落子莫疑。
lines.textEn: Lower, level, or upper—all can break the momentum. Do not hesitate.

lines.text: 虚竹依言落子，局面连转，众人惊叹。
lines.textEn: Xu Zhu obeys, and the position twists repeatedly; all are amazed.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 不必追问来路，先稳住棋势。
lines.textEn: Do not ask where it came from—steady the position first.

lines.text: 旁人听不见传音，虚竹只觉有高人暗中相助。
lines.textEn: Others hear nothing; Xu Zhu senses a master’s hidden aid.

lines.text: 数着之后，局面忽然大变，段延庆这才明白此局秘奥在于先让白棋自断大块，再由后续妙手翻转。
lines.textEn: After several moves, the position changes drastically. Duan Yanqing realizes the secret: let White cut off a large group, then reverse with later finesse.

lines.text: 棋中本有反扑、倒脱靴等弃子之法，但常理只舍少数子力，从未有人敢一口气送出数十子。
lines.textEn: Go has sacrifices like counterattacks and shedding a shoe, yet normally only a few stones are given—no one dares to sacrifice dozens at once.

lines.text: 这等“挤死自己”的奇变，几乎不在高手常识之内；人皆求生脱困，少有人肯先走入绝路。
lines.textEn: Such a strange “self-squeeze” lies beyond common mastery. All seek survival; few choose the dead end first.

lines.text: 他硬着头皮应对，局面竟豁然开朗，苏星河也被这异着震住，思索良久才应一着。
lines.textEn: He steels himself to respond, and the position opens unexpectedly; Su Xinghe is stunned and takes a long time before answering.

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 好像是成了罢？
lines.textEn: It seems it worked?

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 先师布下此局，数十年来无人能解，小神僧解开这个珍珑，在下感激不尽。
lines.textEn: My master set this puzzle and no one solved it for decades. Little master, you have solved it, and I am deeply grateful.

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 我这是误打误撞，全凭长辈见爱，老先生过奖，实在愧不敢当。
lines.textEn: It was sheer luck, thanks to the elders’ kindness. Your praise is too much; I am unworthy.

lines.text: 珍珑局破，石室幽深处传来低沉回应。
lines.textEn: With the Zhenlong Puzzle solved, a low voice echoes from the stone chamber.

lines.speaker: 无崖子
lines.text: 破局者可入，传我真意。
lines.textEn: Let the solver enter and receive my true intent.

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 弟子惶恐，只是误打误撞。
lines.textEn: I am humbled. It was sheer chance.

lines.text: 无崖子以真气相引，传功入脉，虚竹周身气息顿变。
lines.textEn: Wuyazi guides true qi into his meridians; Xu Zhu’s aura changes instantly.

lines.speaker: 无崖子
lines.text: 不执胜负，方得逍遥。
lines.textEn: Let go of victory and defeat to gain freedom.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 师命已成，珍珑局今日终解。
lines.textEn: The master’s will is fulfilled; the Zhenlong Puzzle is solved today.

items.name: 清心丸
items.description: 平复心绪，减少内力消耗。
items.descriptionEn: Calms the mind and reduces inner power use.

items.name: 珍珑札记
items.description: 记录破局思路，提升战斗经验收益。
items.descriptionEn: Notes on solving the puzzle; increases battle EXP gains.
